title: Here are the 18 stocks Jim Cramer is watching, including names in EVs, beauty and oil

title: The 7 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Buy in September 2023
text: Investors wanting to buy good quality S&P 500 stocks at great prices should consider the following seven stocks. Even better, Morningstar analysts have assigned 5-star ratings to all seven of these picks, indicating that each is severely undervalued.

title: Billionaire Ronald Lauder, others to return art to heirs of collector killed by Nazis
text: Estee Lauder cosmetics heir Ron Lauder acquired a piece of art looted by Nazis "through an art dealer decades after it was misappropriated," his spokesman said.

title: The Estee Lauder Companies (EL) Dulls on Cost & Currency Woes
text: The Estee Lauder Companies (EL) is battling volatile inflation levels. The company's international presence exposes it to risks of unfavorable currency rates.

title: 2 Beauty Stocks Beaten By the Ugly Stick But Ready to Rally
text: Beauty stocks have not been pretty this year. Cosmetics retailer Ulta Beauty Inc. NASDAQ: ULTA and Estee Lauder Co. NYSE: EL shares are trading down 12.3% and 38.7%, respectively.

title: Estee Lauder: Recovery Is Expected But High Growth Is Not
text: Estee Lauder's top-line growth has been higher than its closest competitor, L'Oréal, while potentially displaying a significant competitive advantage over its peers. Short-term headwinds, including the pandemic and crackdown on "Daigou" reselling, are unlikely to permanently impact the company's fundamentals. The stock price is currently at fair value, and investors should wait for a higher margin of safety before investing.

title: 7 Consumer Stocks to Sell in September Before They Crash & Burn
text: The market is giving investors mixed signals. But this is a time when what's happening on Main Street differs from what's happening on Wall Street.
